title: anacamptis morio subsp. picta
intro: Anacamptis morio subsp. picta, also known as the purple orchid, is a rare and beautiful subspecies of the green-winged orchid. As an orchid species, it has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include improved digestion, reduced stress, and enhanced immune function. The herbal preparations of Anacamptis morio subsp. picta often involve drying and infusing the roots, leaves, or flowers to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
